title: Hand (disambiguation)
content:
A '''hand''' was the manipulative appendage at the end of a '''[[limb]]'''. '''Hand''' could also refer to the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''''[[Invisible Hand]]''''', [[General]] [[Grievous]]'s [[flagship]].
*'''[[Emperor's Hand]]''', elite covert operatives of the [[Galactic Empire]].
*The '''[[Path of the Open Hand]]''', an extremist [[Religion|cult]] against [[Force power|using]] [[The Force]].
*The '''''[[Open Hand]]''''', a [[transport]] ship owned by [[Kufa]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*A '''[[Shadow Hand]]''', a title given to the second-in-command of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] [[King/Legends|monarch]].
*The '''''[[Invisible Hand/Legends|Invisible Hand]]''''', [[General/Legends|General]] [[Grievous/Legends|Grievous]]' [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]].
*The '''''[[Helping Hand]]''''', a [[Starship/Legends|starship]] owned by [[Plu Makor]].
*The '''[[Emperor's Hand/Legends|Emperor's Hands]]''', elite covert operatives of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*The '''[[Hand of the Empire|Emperor's Hand]]''', later the '''Hand of the Empire''', an organization that served the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Resurgent Sith Empire]]
*The '''[[Empire of the Hand]]''', a Shadow Empire created by [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]].
*The '''[[Grand Lord's Hands]]''', a position within the [[Lost Tribe of Sith]]'s hierarchy.
*A '''[[Hand (One Sith)|Hand]]''', a servant of [[Darth Krayt]] and his [[One Sith]].
*A '''[[Executor (Jedi Covenant)|Hand]]''', a rank in the [[Jedi Covenant]].
*The '''[[Invisible Hand cantina]]''', a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].
*The [[Hand artifact]], a [[Dark side artifact/Legends|dark side artifact]]
*'''[[Dark Hands]]''', a [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force]] short story by [[August Hahn|August]] and [[Cynthia Hahn]].
*'''[[Gorshian hands of death]]''', a [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Plant/Legends|plant]].
*'''[[Hand of Solitude]]''', a title.
*'''[[Hand of Thrawn]]''', was a fortress on the planet [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]].
*'''[[Hand of Judgment]]''', a group of rogue [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtroopers]] that operated in the [[Shelsha sector/Legends|Shelsha sector]].
*The '''[[Open Hand of Hate]]''', a follower of [[Exar Kun/Legends|Exar Kun]]
*'''[[Operation Shadow Hand]]'''
*'''[[Operation Strong Hand]]'''
*'''[[Whip Hand]]'''

==[[In-universe|Out-of-universe]]==
*'''[[Elizabeth Hand]]''', author of the [[Star Wars: Boba Fett (novel series)|''Boba Fett'' series]].

{{Disambig}}

}}
